title: I feel that this might be helpful to many people, so I'm sharing it.
author: Ok_Beginning_8126
selftext:
I’m not here to push tickers or chase hypeJust wanted to share what’s actually been working for me

Most of my time goes into finding stocks that are:

undervalued or overlooked relatively low float quietly consolidating instead of already running

Then I waitNo FOMO, no chasing

What I focus onprice holding above key MAs (5 / 13 / 34 / 55)tightening ranges → potential expansionvolume coming in at the right moments

This helps me avoid random spikesand stay focused on cleaner setups with real structureIt’s not perfect but it’s repeatable

LatelyI’ve been sharing weekly watchlists, setups, and risk ideas with a small groupno signals, no paid stuff, just discussion

If this kind of approach resonates with you,feel free to comment or DMalways open to exchange ideas

comments.author: Angela-Cole
comments.body: I'd like to learn moreI've sent you a DM.

comments.author: Latter-Amount-9304
comments.body: "i make so much money from my own trading that im going to sell all my secrets so you can make money too. join my discord guys"

replies.author: Either-Bug-6856
replies.body: OP literally stated it’s not paid and/or signals

replies.author: Ok_Beginning_8126
replies.body: Yes, I’m not trying to sell anything. The only reason I suggested sending a private message (DM) is that on Reddit, if someone publicly posts external links or files, the post often gets flagged or removed by the system; I simply didn't want this post to get deleted for that reason.
